assumptions: Base height of 25mm inferred from front view scale.
Notch radius of 15mm inferred from symmetry with hole diameter.
Top slot centered on width (50mm) leaving 10mm walls on each side.
Notch approximated as a full through hole; actual semi-circular shape requires a pocket operation.
Upright section origin corrected to (overall_length - upright_thickness, 0, base_height) to align with base block rear edge.
